description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and a multi-level design, featuring a mix of white, black, and terracotta-colored exterior walls. Large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house includes a spacious balcony and a rooftop terrace, both with railings, and a paved driveway leading to a garage. Surrounding the house are several trees and a car parked on the driveway, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area and a set of steps. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of white, black, and terracotta exterior walls. Features include balconies, a rooftop terrace, and a paved driveway with surrounding trees.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the house are visible, showing a black exterior wall, upper-level balcony, and several trees nearby.
description_view_1: The front and main facade are visible, highlighting the terracotta and white walls, large windows, main entryway, and a palm tree in the foreground.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the driveway, garage, car, and a mix of white and terracotta walls, as well as the rooftop terrace and more trees.
description_view_3: The opposite rear side is shown, with a black exterior, upper-level balcony, driveway, car, and a large tree adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, wide glass door, and steps leading up from the driveway, with minimal decorative elements.
